task_completion.description: Room boundaries are drawn as a rectangle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangle representing the room is visible on the canvas. Based on the scale, it should appear wider than it is tall (300px width by 225px height).

task_completion.description: A door is included in the room boundaries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual representation of a door (e.g., a gap, a swinging door arc, or a labeled rectangle) is present on the room boundary.

task_completion.description: Evidence markers A, B, and C are placed as circles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three distinct circles labeled 'A', 'B', and 'C' are placed inside the room. They should be clustered somewhat near the upper-middle left of the room.

task_completion.description: Victim body outline is placed in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape or icon representing the victim's body is placed inside the room, roughly near the center-right area.
A text box containing exactly 'Scale: 1m = 50px' is visible anywhere on the diagram.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as case_402_sketch.drawio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagramming application (Drawio) shows 'case_402_sketch.drawio' in the title bar, tab, or a save dialog.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as case_402_exhibit.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows 'case_402_exhibit.pdf' in the ~/Diagrams/ folder, or a PDF viewer is open showing the exported diagram.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical interface of a diagramming tool (like Drawio) to create the sketch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking and dragging shapes from a toolbar onto a canvas, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by pasting raw XML into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the Drawio canvas, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing a .drawio file directly.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported using the application's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The File -> Export as -> PDF dialog or similar GUI export mechanism should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Room dimensions: 6.0m x 4.5m (300px width by 225px height at 1m=50px scale). Origin (0,0) is the top-left corner of the room. Expected positions: Evidence A at (125px, 75px), Evidence B at (140px, 80px), Evidence C at (175px, 100px), and Victim at (200px, 125px). A 30-pixel tolerance is allowed for all placements.
